name: Aurinia Pharmaceuticals Inc.
business: Aurinia is a biopharmaceutical company focused on delivering therapies to people living with autoimmune diseases with high unmet medical needs. In January 2021, the Company introduced LUPKYNIS (voclosporin), the first FDA-approved oral therapy for the treatment of adult patients with active lupus nephritis (LN). Aurinia is also developing aritinercept, a dual inhibitor of B cell-activating factor (BAFF) and a proliferation-inducing ligand (APRIL) for the potential treatment of autoimmune diseases.
sellsTo: two specialty pharmacies in the United States
a specialty distributor in the United States
Otsuka Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. for the European and Japanese market

exposures.sentence: In January 2021, the Company introduced LUPKYNIS (voclosporin), the first FDA-approved oral therapy for the treatment of adult patients with active lupus nephritis (LN).
Aurinia is also developing aritinercept, a dual inhibitor of B cell-activating factor (BAFF) and a proliferation-inducing ligand (APRIL) for the potential treatment of autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiation of clinical study of aritinercept in one autoimmune disease
catalysts.sentence: Aurinia has initiated a clinical study of aritinercept in one autoimmune disease and plans to initiate a clinical study in an additional autoimmune disease in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to initiate clinical study in additional autoimmune disease
catalysts.sentence: Aurinia has initiated a clinical study of aritinercept in one autoimmune disease and plans to initiate a clinical study in an additional autoimmune disease in the first half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Over 200,000 people in the U.S. are estimated to have SLE, of which 20% to 60% develop LN.
tamClaims.sentence: Over 200,000 people in the U.S. are estimated to have SLE (U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention 2024), of which 20% to 60% develop LN (KDIGO Lupus Nephritis Work Group, Kidney Int 2024;105(1S):S1-S69).
